title: The escape — Ginger spooks and bolts past their feet
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-with-black-spots LADYBUG body costume.
- @Ginger: JACK RUSSELL dog, white body with tan ginger patches on head/ears + saddle, tiny PUMPKIN-ORANGE CAPE.
Camera: static medium-wide, eye-level, on the front porch — matches the closing frame of clip 1, family now stepped out onto the porch boards.

Scene: @front_house_fall front porch — open front door, two warmly lit pumpkin lanterns flanking the doorway, a round vinyl smiling inflatable ghost tied to the left railing, soft fall leaves on the boards.

0:0-0:2 — Static medium-wide. The inflatable ghost on the left railing billows gently in the breeze. Rack focus pulls from the ghost to @Ginger's alert ears in foreground. @Sara center-left, hand still on the doorknob; @Eva center-right gripping @Joe's blue leash; @Joe sitting right-foreground; @Ginger standing left-foreground.

0:2-0:4 — Slow push in to a tighter medium on @Ginger. @Ginger's ears flatten back, she takes one tiny step backward, eyes wide in a cute cartoon-style spook. @Sara's mouth opens in a comic-gasp. @Eva's grip on the leash tightens.

0:4-0:6 — Tracking shot follows @Ginger at low ground-level as she pivots and zooms along the porch boards then off the right edge of frame onto the sidewalk — smooth, all four paws on the wood and concrete, never airborne, never leaping. @Sara and @Eva remain rooted; only their faces turn toward Ginger's exit. @Joe sits calm.
0:6-0:8 — Whip pan back to a tighter medium-close on @Sara and @Eva on the porch. @Eva gives a tiny in-place yank on @Joe's leash. @Sara: "Ginger! Wait!"
0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to the opening medium-wide. Right edge of frame is empty where Ginger exited. @Eva: "Don't run away too, Joe!" The inflatable ghost keeps swaying gently.
cameraStyle: static medium-wide opening into a low-angle tracking shot following Ginger off-frame, capped by a single whip pan back to the porch
closingFrame: Empty porch right of frame where @Ginger just exited; @Sara center-left outside the open door with comic-gasp face; @Eva center-right gripping @Joe's blue leash with a worried pout; @Joe sitting right-foreground in bug costume; round white inflatable ghost still swaying gently on the left railing; soft warm porch lanterns glowing.
